special_mechanics.name: Sleep Meter
special_mechanics.description: Unique game mechanic indicating how close the player character is to falling asleep. Meter decreases automatically but slower when player character stays in motion. When fully drained, all players transported to Dream World where player is more vulnerable to Freddy attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Dream World Transition
special_mechanics.description: When any player's Sleep Meter is fully drained, all players transported to alternate version of environment (Dream World). Can be returned to default level by collecting a boombox.

tier_notes: Tier 3 data sourced from contemporary review commentary. Wikipedia article provides gameplay mechanics and design information but no explicit physics parameters (velocities, gravity values, acceleration rates, or sub-pixel precision data). Game characterized as having 'smooth, quick, and responsive' controls by VideoGames & Computer Entertainment reviewer.
sources_used: Wikipedia: A Nightmare on Elm Street (video game) - Gameplay section and citations
VideoGames & Computer Entertainment (August 1990) - Chris Bieniek review
